date_ideas.text: Browse a used bookstore together and each pick a book for the other.
A casual gym session together, followed by smoothies.
Catch a smaller daytime stage at a local festival before it gets crowded.
Retro arcade or LAN cafe for some low-stakes competitive games.
A sit-down dinner somewhere with good conversation-friendly seating.
Grab coffee and each bring something to work on - low pressure, still time together.
Morning hike in the foothills followed by brunch.
Sunset walk along the beach, then a low-key bar nearby.
